input.command:
# Get Solana currencies from Relay
curl -s -X POST "https://api.relay.link/currencies/v2" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"chainIds":[792703809],"defaultList":true,"limit":5}' 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
for c in d[:5]:
    print(c.get('symbol'), c.get('address'), c.get('chainId'))
"
input.description: Get Solana token addresses from Relay
